# LumenJS Framework Specification

Full-stack Lit web component framework. File-based routing, server loaders, SSR, nested layouts, API routes, i18n. Vite-powered.

## Project Structure

```
project/
├── lumenjs.config.ts     # Config: { title, integrations?, i18n? }
├── pages/                # File-based routes
│   ├── _layout.ts        # Layout (wraps children, uses <slot>)
│   ├── index.ts          # Route: /
│   ├── about.ts          # Route: /about
│   ├── blog/[slug].ts    # Route: /blog/:slug
│   └── docs/[...path].ts # Route: /docs/* (catch-all)
├── api/                  # API routes (export GET/POST/PUT/DELETE)
├── locales/              # i18n: {locale}.json files
├── public/               # Static assets
└── styles/               # CSS files
```

## Routing

### File Path → Route → Tag Name

Conversion rule for routes: strip `.ts`/`.js`, `[param]` → `:param`, `[...param]` → `:...param`, `index` → `/`, prepend `/`.

Conversion rule for tag names: strip extension, replace `/` and `\` with `-`, remove brackets, lowercase, prepend `page-` (pages) or `layout-` (layouts). Root layout dir `''` → `layout-root`.

| File Path | Route | Tag Name |
|-----------|-------|----------|
| `index.ts` | `/` | `page-index` |
| `about.ts` | `/about` | `page-about` |
| `blog/index.ts` | `/blog` | `page-blog-index` |
| `blog/[slug].ts` | `/blog/:slug` | `page-blog-slug` |
| `docs/[...path].ts` | `/docs/:...path` | `page-docs-path` |
| `_layout.ts` (root) | — | `layout-root` |
| `dashboard/_layout.ts` | — | `layout-dashboard` |

Priority: static > dynamic `[param]` > catch-all `[...param]`.

Only `.ts` and `.js` files are scanned. Files starting with `_` are ignored (except `_layout`).

## Pages

Pages are exported classes extending `LitElement` in `pages/`. Tag name is derived from file path — **never use `@customElement()` decorator** (auto-define plugin handles it; decorator causes double-registration).

Class must: extend `LitElement`, be exported. Class name is irrelevant to tag — only file path matters.

## Loaders

Named export `loader()` on any page or layout runs server-side, result injected as `loaderData` property.

```
export async function loader(ctx: { params, query, url, headers, locale }) → object
```

- Property name is exactly `loaderData` (declared as `@property({ type: Object }) loaderData: any = {}`)
- Stripped from client bundles automatically
- Runs on SSR and on client navigation via `/__nk_loader/<path>`
- Must return serializable objects
- Redirect: return `{ __nk_redirect: true, location: string, status: number }` or use `redirect(location, status?)` from `@lumenjs/response`

## Layouts

`_layout.ts` in any `pages/` subdirectory wraps all pages in that directory and children. **Must contain `<slot></slot>`** for child content.

Layout chain nests root → deepest. Layouts persist across navigation — DOM reused when navigating between pages sharing same layout.

Layouts support `loader()` with same rules as pages.

## API Routes

Files in `api/` export named functions per HTTP method: `GET`, `POST`, `PUT`, `DELETE`.

```
export async function GET(req: NkRequest) → object
```

Request shape: `{ method, url, query, params, body, files, headers, projectDir }`.
File upload shape: `{ fieldName, fileName, contentType, data: Buffer, size }`.

- Return plain object → auto-serialized as JSON with 200
- Throw `{ status, message }` → error response
- No `res` object — no `res.send()`, no `res.json()`
- Multipart form data parsed automatically into `req.files`

## i18n

Config: `i18n: { locales: string[], defaultLocale: string, prefixDefault: boolean }`.
Translations: `locales/{locale}.json` with flat `{ "key": "value" }` structure.

URL routing: `/fr/about` → locale `fr`, page `about`. With `prefixDefault: false`, default locale has no prefix.

Resolution order: URL prefix → `nk-locale` cookie → `Accept-Language` header → defaultLocale.

Runtime API (import from `@lumenjs/i18n`):
- `t(key)` → translated string or key if missing
- `getLocale()` → current locale
- `setLocale(locale)` → switches locale (sets cookie, navigates)
- `getI18nConfig()` → config object or null

## Virtual Modules

These imports are resolved by Vite plugins. They do NOT exist on disk — never create files for them or use relative paths.

| Import Path | Contents |
|-------------|----------|
| `@lumenjs/i18n` | t, getLocale, setLocale, initI18n, getI18nConfig |
| `@lumenjs/response` | redirect(location, status?) |
| `@lumenjs/app-shell` | Root `<nk-app>` component |
| `@lumenjs/router` | SPA router |
| `virtual:lumenjs-routes` | Generated route manifest array |

## Integrations

**Tailwind**: `integrations: ['tailwind']`. Components using Tailwind classes in light DOM need `createRenderRoot() { return this; }`.

**NuralyUI**: `integrations: ['nuralyui']`. `<nr-*>` tags in `html` templates are auto-imported with implicit deps (e.g., `nr-button` auto-imports `nr-icon`).

Available: nr-alert, nr-badge, nr-breadcrumb, nr-button, nr-canvas, nr-card, nr-chatbot, nr-checkbox, nr-collapse, nr-color-picker, nr-datepicker, nr-divider, nr-document, nr-dropdown, nr-file-upload, nr-flex, nr-form, nr-grid, nr-icon, nr-image, nr-input, nr-label, nr-layout, nr-menu, nr-modal, nr-panel, nr-popconfirm, nr-radio, nr-radio-group, nr-select, nr-skeleton, nr-slider-input, nr-table, nr-tabs, nr-tag, nr-textarea, nr-timeline, nr-toast, nr-video, nr-iconpicker, nr-container, nr-code-editor.

## SSR

Pages with loaders are server-rendered via `@lit-labs/ssr`. Loader data embedded as `<script type="application/json" id="__nk_ssr_data__">`. Client hydrates without re-render. Fallback to CSR on SSR failure.

## Config Reference

```typescript
// lumenjs.config.ts
export default {
  title: string,                    // HTML <title>
  integrations?: string[],          // 'tailwind' | 'nuralyui'
  i18n?: {
    locales: string[],              // ['en', 'fr']
    defaultLocale: string,          // 'en'
    prefixDefault: boolean,         // prefix default locale in URLs
  },
};
```

## CLI

```
lumenjs dev    [--project <dir>] [--port <n>] [--editor-mode]
lumenjs build  [--project <dir>] [--out <dir>]
lumenjs serve  [--project <dir>] [--port <n>]
lumenjs add    <integration>
```

Build output: `.lumenjs/{client/, server/, locales/, manifest.json}`.

## Constraints

1. No `@customElement()` — auto-define handles it; decorator causes double-registration
2. No `res.send()`/`res.json()` in API routes — return objects
3. Property name is `loaderData` exactly
4. Layouts require `<slot></slot>`
5. `@lumenjs/*` are virtual modules — no files, no relative imports
6. `loader` must be named export function (not default, not arrow const)
7. `_`-prefixed files (except `_layout`) are skipped by scanner
8. Only `.ts`/`.js` scanned — no `.tsx`/`.jsx`
9. Class must `extends LitElement` (auto-define checks source text)
10. Use `loader()` for data — not `connectedCallback` fetch
